top_tweets.text:
Introducing Claude Design by Anthropic Labs: make prototypes, slides, and one-pagers by talking to Claude.

Powered by Claude Opus 4.7, our most capable vision model. Available in research preview on the Pro, Max, Team, and Enterprise plans, rolling out throughout the day. https://t.co/2BgBGtgYGX
top_tweets.author: claudeai
top_tweets.name: Claude
top_tweets.summary_zh: Anthropic 推出 Claude Design，可透過對話生成原型、簡報與文件，由最強視覺模型 Opus 4.7 驅動，現於 Pro 以上方案逐步開放。此功能引發業界對 Figma、Adobe 等設計工具的衝擊討論。

top_tweets.text:
🧵 My tips for getting the best results out of Claude Design! I’m on the verticals team at Anthropic which means I serve 7 different products. Claude Design makes it possible!
1. Set up your design system and your core screens. An hour of setup and refinement here is worth it
top_tweets.author: Flomerboy
top_tweets.name: Ryan Mather
top_tweets.summary_zh: Anthropic 垂直團隊成員分享 Claude Design 使用技巧：前期花一小時建立設計系統與核心畫面，後續效率提升極大。適合需要同時服務多個產品的設計團隊。

top_tweets.text:
> be anthropic
> ship opus 4.6. most powerful model on earth.
> still unprofitable.
> notice 98% of users are bad prompters.
> notice 4.6 silently fixes their prompts anyway. for free.
> ship opus 4.7. market it as "more powerful." (it is)
> also: it stops fixing your prompts.
> https://t.co/scNUstGjqb
top_tweets.author: the_smart_ape
top_tweets.name: The Smart Ape 🔥
top_tweets.summary_zh: 觀察指出 Opus 4.6 會自動修正使用者的爛 prompt，但 4.7 刻意取消這功能，迫使使用者學習更精準的提示工程，反映 Anthropic 在商業化與使用者教育間的策略轉向。

top_tweets.text:
Introducing our new collaboration with Anthropic: Canva is now in Claude Design! Generate ideas in Claude. Edit in Canva. No friction. No starting from scratch. 
https://t.co/f220BR4AZk https://t.co/tLHHLd1rO3
top_tweets.author: canva
top_tweets.name: Canva
top_tweets.summary_zh: Canva 與 Anthropic 合作，讓 Claude Design 產出的內容可直接匯入 Canva 編輯，降低從 AI 生成到實際設計工具的轉換摩擦。

top_tweets.text:
Anthropic pays engineers $750,000+ a year to understand how LLMs work.

Stanford just put a 2 hour lecture that covers 80% of it for FREE.

Bookmark this. Give it 2 hours today.

It might be the highest ROI thing you do this month: https://t.co/ezQQt3Q73J
top_tweets.author: EvanLuthra
top_tweets.name: Evan Luthra
top_tweets.summary_zh: 史丹佛開放 2 小時免費 LLM 課程，涵蓋 Anthropic 工程師年薪 75 萬美元所鑽研內容的八成，被推薦為本月投資報酬率最高的學習資源。

top_tweets.text:
ANTHROPIC JUST DROPPED A 33-PAGE GUIDE.

This is the most practical breakdown of Claude Skills I’ve seen.

Bookmark this before you forget.

33 pages.
Persistent instructions.
No repetition.
No re-explaining every time.

Read it today. Link below.

Claude → Skills → Memory → https://t.co/lHXwrwQWxm
top_tweets.author: kirillk_web3
top_tweets.name: Kirill
top_tweets.summary_zh: Anthropic 釋出 33 頁 Claude Skills 實用指南，說明如何設定持久指令與記憶功能，避免每次對話重複解釋需求，適合需要穩定工作流程的使用者。

top_tweets.text:
This 30-minute speech by the Head of Anthropic "Coding Agents" researcher will teach you more about vibe coding than 100 paid courses.

Bookmark it & give it 30 minutes today. This video will change the way you use AI forever, https://t.co/2ymJrZwj1W
top_tweets.author: 0xMovez
top_tweets.name: Movez
top_tweets.summary_zh: Anthropic「Coding Agents」研究主管 30 分鐘演講，被譽為比百堂付費課程更能改變 AI 使用思維的 vibe coding 教學資源。

top_tweets.text:
alright - verdict is in - Motion Design is solved

made with HyperFrames + Claude Design

btw - HyperFrames is open source, star it on github and I'll send tutorial on how i made this with 2 prompts. https://t.co/uYzeIVDvlA
top_tweets.author: liu8in
top_tweets.name: Bin Liu
top_tweets.summary_zh: 開發者用 Claude Design 搭配開源工具 HyperFrames，僅兩個 prompt 就完成動態設計作品，認為 Motion Design 已被 AI 解決。

top_tweets.text:
Anthropic now requires new Claude users to verify their identity with a government-issued photo ID and a live selfie 

No law forcing AI companies like this to do full ID checks. This appears to be Anthropic’s own choice

They are also using Persona for the verification https://t.co/aQfIVSqx8D
top_tweets.author: Pirat_Nation
top_tweets.name: Pirat_Nation 🔴
top_tweets.summary_zh: Anthropic 開始要求新用戶以政府核發身分證與即時自拍驗證身分，此舉並非法規強制，而是公司自主選擇，引發隱私權與使用門檻的討論。

top_tweets.text: Anthropic CEO Dario Amodei: “50% of all tech jobs, entry-level lawyers, consultants, and finance professionals will be completely wiped out within 1–5 years.” https://t.co/sXcT59gWYj
top_tweets.author: TFTC21
top_tweets.name: TFTC
top_tweets.summary_zh: Anthropic CEO 預測 1-5 年內，50% 的科技入門職位、初階律師、顧問與金融從業人員將被 AI 完全取代，對職涯規劃帶來重大警示。

criteria.score_formula: likes（主要）+ Claude 人工過濾廣告/招聘/meme/非設計
claude_filter_rules: 排除純廣告、招聘文（有洞見的 JD 除外）
排除與產品設計/PM 無關（crypto、體育、政治等）
排除 meme/搞笑但無內容
偏好有觀點的原創內容
